_comment: Explicit risk-normalization curves. These were the missing quantitative content in v3.x specs. Every sub-score maps a raw real-world value to a common 0-10 risk scale. Tune here, not in code.

altitude_score._doc: metres above sea level -> 0..10. Flat below 500m; risk ramps through the 1500-3500m hypoxia band.

climate_variance_score._doc: annual temperature range (deg C, hottest-month avg high minus coldest-month avg low) -> 0..10.

humidity_score._doc: annual mean relative humidity (%). Comfort centred on ~50%; both arid and muggy extremes score higher.

medical_risk._doc: minutes to nearest tier-3A hospital -> 0..10. 120 min (the hard 2h limit) maps to 8.

penalties._doc: Missing data is NOT treated optimistically. A node missing an input takes an additive risk penalty and is flagged PARTIAL.
